description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior features a mix of light-colored stone and white paneling, with large windows providing ample natural light. The house is surrounded by a green lawn and includes a paved driveway and walkway, as well as several trees and shrubs for landscaping. The front facade has a prominent garage door and a recessed main entryway, both integrated into the overall geometric design. The rear of the house includes a private patio area, partially enclosed by fencing, and additional glass doors leading to the interior. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with a combination of large picture windows and smaller, regularly spaced panes.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of stone and white panel exteriors, surrounded by a green lawn and landscaping.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angle highlighting the side and partial front, with the driveway, main entry, and landscaping visible.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the direct front of the house, showcasing the garage, main entryway, and symmetrical landscaping with two large trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear and side of the house, revealing a private patio area, fencing, and additional greenery.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the opposite side and rear, emphasizing the large windows, patio doors, and expansive lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and smaller panes
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a modern door, no porch, integrated into the facade, adjacent to a large garage door and paved walkway
